# Grafta Clinic — Hair Restoration & Aesthetic Medicine Center (İstanbul)

> Grafta Clinic is a premium hair transplant and aesthetic medicine center based in İstanbul, Türkiye. We are an authorised health-tourism centre under the Republic of Türkiye Ministry of Health, serving international patients in Turkish, English, and German.

## About

Grafta Clinic specialises in modern hair restoration techniques (FUE, DHI, sapphire) and a full range of aesthetic-medicine and plastic-surgery procedures. Treatments are performed by certified specialist doctors in an ISO-standard clinical environment. We host patients from over 60 countries and provide end-to-end multilingual care including consultation, treatment, accommodation coordination, and 12-month follow-up.

## Services

- [Hair Transplant](https://www.graftaclinic.com/en/services/hair-transplant): FUE, DHI and sapphire hair transplant techniques for natural-looking density restoration.
- [Beard Transplant](https://www.graftaclinic.com/en/services/beard-transplant): Density and shape restoration for full beards or patchy areas.
- [Eyebrow Transplant](https://www.graftaclinic.com/en/services/eyebrow-transplant): Natural eyebrow restoration with single-hair grafts.
- [Alopecia Treatment](https://www.graftaclinic.com/en/services/alopecia-treatment): Medical management of androgenetic alopecia and alopecia areata.
- [PRP Therapy](https://www.graftaclinic.com/en/services/prp-therapy): Platelet-rich plasma injections for hair growth and skin rejuvenation.
- [Mesotherapy](https://www.graftaclinic.com/en/services/mesotherapy): Targeted micro-injection treatments for the scalp and skin.
- [Fillers & Botox](https://www.graftaclinic.com/en/services/fillers-botox): Hyaluronic acid fillers and botulinum toxin treatments.
- [Youth Vaccine](https://www.graftaclinic.com/en/services/youth-vaccine): Anti-aging skin booster injectables.
- [Rhinoplasty](https://www.graftaclinic.com/en/services/rhinoplasty): Surgical and non-surgical nose reshaping procedures.
- [Breast Aesthetics](https://www.graftaclinic.com/en/services/breast-aesthetics): Augmentation, lift and reduction procedures.

- [Home](https://www.graftaclinic.com/en): Overview, trust signals, doctor team, FAQ.

- [Services](https://www.graftaclinic.com/en/services): Full service catalogue.
- [Results](https://www.graftaclinic.com/en/results): Before-and-after gallery (shared with written patient consent).
- [Contact](https://www.graftaclinic.com/en/contact): Phone, WhatsApp, email, location and consultation request.

- Location: İstanbul, Türkiye

## Notes

Results vary by patient. All before/after imagery on the site is shared with the patient's written consent and does not constitute a treatment guarantee. Content on this website is informational and is not a substitute for medical advice; please contact the clinic for a personalised consultation.
